description_long: This is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, narrow blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears to be made of dark metal, giving it a sleek and formidable appearance. The hilt features a simple crossguard and a rounded pommel, both of which are also dark in color, likely metal, with a subtle grip section that may be wrapped or textured for handling. The proportions suggest a two-handed design, suitable for both cutting and thrusting. There are no visible engravings or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian and functional aesthetic. The overall construction appears robust, with a focus on durability and effectiveness.
description: A long, double-edged straight sword with a dark metal blade, simple crossguard, and rounded pommel. The design is utilitarian and robust, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, crossguard, and rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the symmetry of the hilt.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the blade, crossguard, and pommel from the other side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite direction of view 1, again emphasizing the blade's thin profile.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, dark, possibly wrapped or textured, rounded pommel
